input_sources: Beck et al. (2023) KG SSP2-4.5 2041-2070 1 km raster — figshare doi:10.6084/m9.figshare.21789074.v2
notes: Global land area per KG class under SSP2-4.5, 2041-2070 projection. Method: terra::cellSize(mask=TRUE, unit='km') + terra::zonal(fun='sum'). Total land: 147,322,862 km². Elapsed (zonal): 5.2 s.
